greeting: The rail worker sits with shoulders hunched from coal dust and noise. He watches the door every time it opens.
shrug: "Track talk will not help you there."

entries.text: "Rail man. That is enough to get blamed for delays and not enough to get paid for them."
"Coal line, cars, couplings, brakemen yelling in the dark. The yard will kill a careless man faster than whiskey."
"Cumberland is not a town now, not only. It is a machine that learned to eat mountains."
"Stone comes down strange lately. Men from the cut drink hard and leave early. That is not usual."
